name: Dave the Diver
description: Trainer for Dave the Diver (Proton, Unity IL2CPP). Oxygen patch is in PlayerBreathHandler's set method in GameAssembly.dll.

fields.name: Infinite Oxygen
fields.description: NOPs PlayerBreathHandler.BreathUpdate so oxygen never decreases while diving.

patches.description: Replace 'push rdi' with 'ret; nop' at PlayerBreathHandler.BreathUpdate — breath consumption skipped

fields.name: Invincible
fields.description: NOPs PlayerBreathHandler.HPUpdate so HP never decreases from depth pressure or enemies.

patches.description: Replace 'push rbx' with 'ret; nop' at PlayerBreathHandler.HPUpdate — depth/pressure HP damage skipped
Replace 'mov' with 'ret; nop' at PlayerBreathHandler.SetHitHP — direct hit damage skipped
